texto: Every man shall find his own desire
autor: there is no one thing which pleases all: one man gathers thorns and another roses.
explicacao: Citação de there is no one thing which pleases all: one man gathers thorns and another roses. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Every man shall find his own desire” articula reflexao, petronius-arbiter, every em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
